title: Vera Bradley 2025 Earnings Outlook and Performance
text: Vera Bradley reported challenging 2025 earnings with annual earnings of -$62.2M for fiscal year ending February 1, 2025, showing negative growth of 893.4%. Net profit for the twelve months ending August 2, 2025 was -$97.91 million, representing an 11,645.4% decrease year-over-year. The company reported earnings on June 11, 2025 with an EPS of -$0.36 versus -$0.12 expected, indicating a significant earnings miss. Overall outlook appears negative with expected continued headwinds. Multiple challenges include declining revenues, increased losses, and macroeconomic pressures. The earnings call revealed sharp decline in revenues and net loss, outlet channel struggles, and increased promotional activity affecting margins. Strategic initiatives like Project Restoration and partnerships aim to improve customer engagement, drive growth, and optimize earnings through operational efficiencies.
